INSERT DATA { <http://example/book1> Book.title 'Harry Potter'; Book.author 'J.K. Rowling'; Book.price 29.99. };
INSERT DATA { <http://example/book2> Book.title 'The Lord of the Rings'; Book.author 'J.R.R. Tolkien'; Book.price 39.99. };
INSERT DATA { <http://example/book3> Book.title '1984'; Book.author 'George Orwell'; Book.price 19.99. };
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL_TO_ARRAY('SELECT DISTINCT ?author WHERE { ?s <http://example/bookStore/author> ?author } ORDER BY ?author','http://example/bookStore',2);

SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL_TO_ARRAY('SELECT ?title WHERE { SELECT ?title ?author WHERE { ?s <http://example/bookStore/title> ?title . ?s <http://example/bookStore/author> ?author } GROUP BY ?title HAVING (COUNT(?author) > 1) }','http://example/bookStore',2);
